creator: naddy@mips.inka.de
text:
> How does this look after one year? I'd say if other apps does not work
> with new flac by now, they don't deserve to be supported anymore.

Dropping applications that have been orphaned by their upstream
maintainer might be a bit harsh.  Experience from the OpenBSD ports
tree suggests that patching applications to use the new FLAC is not
difficult (but neither is it purely mechanical).

There is no particular technical holdup to switching to new FLAC.
I just need to sit down and actually do it.

-- 
Christian "naddy" Weisgerber                          naddy@mips.inka.de
